channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. Apple targets dozens of OpenAI employees with legal letters  Financial Times
  2. How a bungled email from Apple’s lawyer soured talks with OpenAI months before Apple sued  NBC News
  3. The AI burn book: Decoding the cat fights between Sam Altman, Elon Musk, and Anthropic  Business Insider
  4. Why Apple Sued OpenAI, New York Takes on Data Centers, and What to Know about Cyclosporiasis  WIRED
  5. Apple Sues OpenAI, Accusing It of Stealing Company Secrets  The New York Times

item.title: Mother of Kardashian matriarch Kris Jenner, Mary Jo, dies at 91 - BBC
item.description:
1. Mother of Kardashian matriarch Kris Jenner, Mary Jo, dies at 91  BBC
  2. Kris Jenner's mother Mary Jo 'MJ' Shannon dies at 91  ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
  3. Kim Kardashian clarifies timing of vacation photos after grandma Mary Jo 'MJ' Campbell's death  Page Six
  4. Kris Jenner announces death of her mother, Mary Jo ‘MJ’ Shannon  NBC News
  5. Kris Jenner’s mom, MJ, passes away at 91  KTLA

item.title: Crypto regulatory text expected to be released Thursday does not have Senate Democrat support - Politico
item.description:
1. Crypto regulatory text expected to be released Thursday does not have Senate Democrat support  Politico
  2. The time for Clarity is here: Congress has a chance to pass the most important technology law since the Telecoms Act  Fortune
  3. Trump Meets With Senators in Last Push for Clarity Act. Why It Matters for Coinbase.  Barron's
  4. Clarity Act negotiations: High-level White House meeting planned, sources say  CoinDesk
  5. The CLARITY Act Delay Is Now A Compliance Problem, Not Just A Political One  Forbes
